heroHeadline: Hamas Submits Counterproposals as Disarmament Deadline Passes; Cairo Talks Continue
heroSubtitle: The deadliest attack on Jewish people since the Holocaust — assault timeline, hostage crisis resolved Jan 2026, intelligence failures, and IDF response. Hamas submitted amendments rather than accepting the Board of Peace disarmament framework as the April 11 deadline expired; talks continue in Cairo while the Gaza ceasefire remains fragile. The Board of Peace faces a severe cash crunch with less than $1B of $17B pledged received.
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Israel Police, UN OCHA, Israeli government, Reuters, AP, Haaretz, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are official Israeli counts; Hamas-theater figures are separately noted and contested. All 251 hostages accounted for as of January 26, 2026. Cumulative conflict dead (Oct 7, 2023 – Mar 25, 2026): 72,265 Palestinians per OCHA/Gaza MoH.
